title: How to partner with Yandex Pro and why
content:
How to partner with Yandex Pro and why

Last updated 18 Dec 2024

EN KA

Now, businesses you know can attract new customers and boost profits through promotions.

All they need to do is to post their discount offers in Yandex Pro (Pro Benefits section) or the Fleetroom website.

Products and services can reach 29 000+ unique Yandex Pro users a month (depending on city and country).

Benefits of partnering with Yandex Pro:

Attract new customers among the active audience of drivers and partner company employees.

Increase sales thanks to new customers.

Improve brand reputation by partnering with Yandex Pro and mentions in the service.

Simple placement (the whole process takes an average of 14 days depending on the country).

What we recommend

Drivers are interested in discounts on fuel, car repairs, car services, spare parts, tire services, new vehicles, and car washes.

Promotion requirements: offers must be exclusive to drivers with Yandex Pro and beneficial for them (our team checks all new offers). Promotions must be valid for at least six months.

How to post promotions

Companies must submit an application.

Requirements:

●  The promotion name, a one-sentence summary, and a detailed description

●  A link to the promotion on the company’s site or social media

●  The code word or promo code required to get the discount

●  Promotion duration

●  Text for the button to press and follow the link

●  Contact phone number for partner companies and drivers

To partner with Yandex Pro, businesses need to:

Have official company registration

Sign a letter of guarantee on the organization’s official letterhead

Fill out the form (link) about the promotion (separate form required for each promotion)

Pass moderation by the Yandex Pro team

Tell other people in the business community about this opportunity — we’re open to new partnerships!
